summary: The diff implements most of the required frontend pages, components, navigation, styling, and backend structure. However, the Motoko backend uses fabricated placeholder menu data (3 generic categories: Appetizers, Pizzas, Pastas) instead of the 24 real categories with exact items, names, descriptions, prices, and vegetarian flags as specified. The frontend Menu page does include the full real menu data as a local constant (FULL_MENU) but the backend data is completely wrong, breaking REQ-11's requirement for the backend to store the real data and for the frontend to fetch from the canister. The gallery page is missing gallery-poee and gallery-drinks placeholder images. The reservation form opens WhatsApp in a new tab rather than redirecting the browser.

missing_requirements.requirement: Store the complete restaurant menu data (all 24 categories and items with names, descriptions, prices, and vegetarian flags) in the Motoko backend as stable structured data. Expose a query endpoint to retrieve all menu categories and items so the frontend Menu page fetches real data from the canister.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo only contains 3 fabricated placeholder categories (Appetizers, Pizzas, Pastas) with generic items and USD prices, not the 24 real categories with correct names, descriptions, Indian Rupee prices, and vegetarian flags as specified. The frontend Menu page fetches from the backend but falls back to local FULL_MENU data, meaning the canister is not the real data source.

missing_requirements.requirement: Gallery page must display all 12 generated placeholder gallery images including gallery-poee.dim_800x600.png and gallery-drinks.dim_800x600.png.
missing_requirements.reason: The Gallery page uses food images (food-pizza, food-starters, food-coffee, food-mojito, food-chai, food-salad, food-eggs, food-burger) as substitutes instead of the specifically requested gallery-poee.dim_800x600.png and gallery-drinks.dim_800x600.png placeholder images.

missing_requirements.requirement: On valid submission, redirect the browser to the wa.me URL with all fields pre-filled in the message.
missing_requirements.reason: ReservationForm.tsx uses window.open(..., '_blank') which opens a new tab, whereas the spec explicitly says 'redirect the browser to' the WhatsApp URL.

hallucinated_features.description: A 'Book a Table' button added to the desktop Navbar linking directly to wa.me/919167340197.
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec does not mention a 'Book a Table' button in the navbar. The navbar should only contain Home, About, Menu, Gallery, and Contact navigation links.

hallucinated_features.description: Search functionality with a search bar added to the Menu page.
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec does not request any search feature on the Menu page. Only a horizontal scrollable category tab/pill filter bar was requested.

hallucinated_features.description: caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking added to the Footer.
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec does not request any third-party attribution or UTM tracking links in the footer. The footer content is fully specified and does not include this.
